description_long: This sculpture depicts two human figures, one standing upright and supporting another who appears to be either injured or unconscious, draped over the standing figure's arms. The figures are rendered in a classical style, with detailed musculature and expressive postures. The standing figure gazes forward with a solemn expression, while the supported figure's head and limbs hang limply. The base is circular and textured, suggesting a naturalistic ground. The entire piece is monochromatic, resembling white marble or plaster, and the surface is matte with some visible roughness. There are some visible imperfections and missing sections, particularly on the rear side.
description: A classical-style sculpture of two human figures, one supporting the other, rendered in white with a textured circular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures clearly, with the standing figure holding the limp body across their arms.
description_view_1: Angled side view emphasizing the interaction between the two figures and the draped posture of the supported figure.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible surface imperfections and missing sections, showing the back of the standing figure.
description_view_3: Back-side view highlighting the musculature of the standing figure and the overall dynamic pose.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures, one supporting the other
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the background is neutral and does not indicate an environment.
